Favorites genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Romance, Fantasy, Adventure

div.div:
At the age of eight, I-Jin Yu lost his parents in a plane crash and became stranded in a foreign land, forced to become a child mercenary in order to stay alive. He returns home ten years later to be reunited with his family in Korea, where food and shelter are plenty and everything seems peaceful. But I-Jin will soon learn that life as a teenager is a whole other feat of survival. With only one year of high school left, I-Jin must master new tactics to maneuver his way around the schoolhouse battleground. Can he survive a year of high school? Or rather, will the school be able to survive him?
(Source: WEBTOON)

The Almighty Demon Lord, Resurrected!: The once-reigning demon lord, Lord Shitian, was betrayed by his confidantes during his critical ascension to become a demon saint. With the combined powers of the Five Benevolent Sects, the demon lord was vanquished. Just when the world thought it was rid of the demon lord, he reincarnates into the body of the disciple Mo Fan. With his body weakened and power lost, the demon lord can only wait patiently as he recuperates. This time, combining both demonic and human energy, he will rise again stronger than ever! Under the noses of the so-called Five Benevolent Sects, Lord Shitian embarks on a journey of vengeance, bloody retribution, extermination, ridding the world of all evil, and ultimately reclaiming his throne as the almighty demon lord!
